title: Bellamy Still Follows Doflamingo
description: Pages 4–8 focus on bellamy still follows doflamingo, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as bellamy refuses to abandon his pride even after Doflamingo uses him, leaving Luffy trapped between mercy and battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Quit throwing the same, useless attacks at me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If you really truly wished to kill me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There are countless ways of dis- posing of an enemy beyond one's own reach!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: But the moment you laid your feelings about Corazon bare...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: In an attempt to catch me off- guard,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Do you remember it? The document > from back then?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: With this, we can save a country known as Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Thank you. I will take care of this. Do not worry.

summary: Bellamy Still Follows Doflamingo advances the Dressrosa story through Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
